name: Basic Cheesecake Crust:
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed graham crackers and sugar.
2. Add melted butter to the mixture.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined and moistened.
4. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan, up one-third the way up the sides.
5. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before adding the filling.
Variations:
- Use ginger snaps instead of graham crackers for a spicier crust or pumpkin cheesecakes.
- Use chocolate wafers instead of graham crackers for chocolate, white chocolate, or fruit-flavored cheesecakes like raspberry, cherry, or orange.
- For a sweeter and moister crust (only if the cheesecake will be eaten quickly), use brown sugar instead of white sugar.
